allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Mohammad Reza\\OneDrive - Politecnico di Milano\\Showreel\\Data_Cleaned" -Recurse -Force | Where-Object {$_.Mode -notmatch 'd'} | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell($transcriptPath = "c:\\Users\\Mohammad Reza\\OneDrive - Politecnico di Milano\\Showreel\\transcripts"; $items = Get-ChildItem -Path $transcriptPath -Force; $vttCount = \($items | Where-Object {$_.Extension -eq '.vtt'}\).Count; $emptyCount = \($items | Where-Object {$_.Extension -eq '.empty'}\).Count; $failedCount = \($items | Where-Object {$_.Extension -eq '.failed'}\).Count; $otherCount = $items.Count - $vttCount - $emptyCount - $failedCount; Write-Output "VTT files: $vttCount`nEmpty markers: $emptyCount`nFailed markers: $failedCount`nOther files/dirs: $otherCount`nTotal: $\($items.Count\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Mohammad Reza\\OneDrive - Politecnico di Milano\\Showreel\\Michele_OneDrive" -Recurse | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, @{Name="SizeMB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB, 2\)}} | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Mohammad Reza\\OneDrive - Politecnico di Milano\\Showreel\\Michele_OneDrive" -Recurse | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object @{Name="File";Expression={$_.Name}}, Extension, @{Name="SizeMB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB, 3\)}} | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
